title: Woodland Wins Houston Open
excerpt: Gary Woodland takes the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, Nicolai Højgaard comes in second
body:
Tour News: Woodland Claims Victory

Gary Woodland has taken the top spot at the Texas Children's Houston Open, finishing with a score of -18. Nicolai Højgaard came in second, just one stroke behind, with a score of -17.

DP World Tour Update

Eugenio Chacarra is currently in the lead at the DP World Tour event in India, with a four-stroke lead going into Sunday.

LIV Golf Latest

The 4Aces GC team has taken the top spot at the LIV Golf event in Singapore, finishing with a score of -27.

Woodland's Score
-18
Højgaard's Score
-17
Chacarra's Lead
4 strokes

The golf world is heating up, with multiple events taking place across the globe. Stay tuned for more updates and analysis from the world of golf.
